frontmatter.title: Add AI to Your Node
frontmatter.description: An Experimental AI Prompt for setting up your GPU as a Livepeer Orchestrator. Add AI inference pipelines to an existing go-livepeer transcoding node — hardware check, aiModels.json configuration, and startup command update.
frontmatter.keywords: [livepeer, orchestrator, AI inference, AI runner, aiModels.json, pipeline, VRAM, Cascade, batch AI, GPU]
